templates.name: Ambush on the Trail
templates.intro: Shapes burst from the undergrowth — Germanic warriors block the path.

templates.name: Wolves in the Mire
templates.intro: Low growls echo from the fog. Yellow eyes track your every step.

templates.name: Raiding Party
templates.intro: Stones whistle past. A raiding party has found your trail.

templates.name: The Clearing
templates.intro: You stumble into a clearing — and into an ambush. Steel and fangs surround you.

bossEncounters.name: Arminius's Champion
bossEncounters.intro: A towering Germanic champion steps from the treeline, flanked by his guard. The final test.

bossEncounters.name: The Grove Witch
bossEncounters.intro: The trees twist apart to reveal a figure wreathed in green flame. The forest itself fights against you.

easy.name: Forest Scouts
easy.intro: A pair of scouts spot your column and attack.

easy.name: Lone Wolves
easy.intro: Wolves slink from the undergrowth, hungry and desperate.

easy.name: Eerie Chanting
easy.intro: Chanting drifts from the fog. A seer and his guard block your path.

easy.name: Viper Nest
easy.intro: You step into a nest of marsh vipers. They strike without warning.

easy.name: Swamp Crawlers
easy.intro: Bloated shapes slither from the mud. The swamp breeds foul things.

mid.name: Ambush on the Trail
mid.intro: Shapes burst from the undergrowth — Germanic warriors block the path.

mid.name: Raiding Party
mid.intro: Stones whistle past. A raiding party has found your trail.

mid.name: Wolf Pack
mid.intro: A whole wolf pack emerges from the fog. There is no retreat.

mid.name: Cursed Hollow
mid.intro: Two seers stand in a hollow, their chanting shaking the air. A warrior guards them.

mid.name: Wolves and Whispers
mid.intro: Wolves circle in the mist while eerie chanting echoes from behind the trees.

mid.name: Venomous Ambush
mid.intro: Vipers and slingers attack from the swamp in a coordinated ambush.

mid.name: Shield Line
mid.intro: A shieldbearer hunkers down while warriors form behind him. A disciplined formation.

mid.name: Leech Swarm
mid.intro: The ground writhes. Bloated leeches pour from the mud in a sickening wave.

hard.name: The Clearing
hard.intro: You stumble into a clearing — and into an ambush. Steel and fangs surround you.

hard.name: War Band
hard.intro: A full war band charges from the trees. Prepare for a desperate fight.

hard.name: The Oak Shield
hard.intro: A massive warrior blocks the trail, oak shield raised. His warband flanks you.

hard.name: Ritual Guard
hard.intro: An elite warrior guards two seers performing a dark ritual. Stop them or be consumed.

hard.name: The Hunting Party
hard.intro: An elite warrior commands a pair of trained war wolves. They advance as one.

hard.name: Poison Grove
hard.intro: Vipers slither among the roots as a seer chants protection. A warrior guards the approach.

hard.name: The Burning Effigy
hard.intro: A towering wicker effigy burns in the clearing. Its smoke protects the warriors gathered around it.

hard.name: Shield Wall
hard.intro: Two shieldbearers form an impenetrable wall while slingers rain stones from behind.

hard.name: Swamp Horror
hard.intro: The swamp itself attacks — leeches, vipers, and a chanting seer drive the assault.
